ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Walking, Running, Jogging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "calorie_burn_rate" REAL /* Calorie burn rate per hour for the activity */,
  "energy_expenditure" REAL /* Energy expenditure rate per hour for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_dataset" TEXT /* Dataset used to train the model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to evaluate the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the dataset is associated with */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in GB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., f1-score, precision, recall) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version is associated with */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the metric is associated with */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the device is associated with */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the data comes from */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the data is associated with */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "data" TEXT /* Raw activity data */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate at the time of the activity */,
  "step_count" INTEGER /* Step count at the time of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recognized_activities" (
  "recognized_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recognized activity */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the recognized activity is associated with */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recognized activity */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recognized activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the recognized activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the recognized activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recognized_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recognized_activities_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recognized_activities_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES activity_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the log is associated with */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the log is associated with */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the goal is associated with */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the goal is associated with */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date of the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of the goal (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation is associated with */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the recommendation is associated with */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Personalized recommendation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "user_device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-device association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date the user connected to the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_devices_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_activity_data" (
  "device_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device activity data */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "data" TEXT /* Raw activity data from the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_activity_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_activity_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
